center.name: 塔布拉斯島
center.summary: 塔布拉斯島是菲律賓的島嶼，位於民都洛南部以東約50公里，由朗布隆省負責管轄，最高點海拔高度665米，主要經濟活動有稻米種植和漁業，2007年人口154,413。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines found in the Visayan islands of Negros Island, Panay, Cebu, Tablas Island and Romblon

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is endemic to the Philippines, ranging from Samar and Tablas south to Mindanao, Basilan and the Sulu Archipelago. It appears to be locally common on some islands, but it is rare in other localities. It lives in forest below in elevation, being found in coastal lowlands and foothills
